headline: Nasdaq 100 Hits Record Above 30,000 On Micron's 18% Rally: Stock Market Today
summary: Nasdaq and Russell 2000 hit fresh highs as Micron surges 18%. The iShares Semiconductor ETF jumped 4.8%, pushing year-to-date gains past 80%.
